title: Reporting a problem
explanation:
Reporting a problem

Transcript

Customer: Hello. I bought this phone online last week but it doesn't work.
Assistant: I'm sorry to hear that. What's the problem?
Customer: The screen goes black when I turn it on.
Assistant: Do you have the receipt?
Customer: Yes, here it is.
Assistant: We can replace it or give you a refund.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The customer bought the phone [*online|in a market|abroad].
The shop offers a replacement or a [*refund|discount|gift].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option.

questions.text: The customer bought it last ____. | *week | month | year
The screen goes ____ when they turn it on. | *black | blue | red
The assistant says: 'I'm sorry to ____ that.' | *hear | know | see

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The customer explains the problem [*clearly|never|in writing].
The customer bought the phone [*recently|years ago|never].
